basic_details.job_title: Gujarat University Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Research Associate, Professor and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Research Associate, Professor and Chief Academic and Administrative Officer

age_limit.details: No specific age limits have been mentioned for any of the posts in the official notification.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate in Sanskrit with minimum 55% and relevant experience for Chief Academic and Administrative Officer. NET/GSET/Ph.D. in Sanskrit for Research Associate. Expertise in Natural Farming/Ayurveda/NGO Management/Education with 15+ years of experience for Professor of Practice.
qualification.details: Chief Academic and Administrative Officer: Post Graduate in Sanskrit with a minimum of 55% marks and relevant experience in education/research/administration. Research Associate: NET/GSET/Ph.D. in Sanskrit. Professor of Practice (POP): Expertise in Natural Farming/Ayurveda/NGO Management/Education with 15 years or more of experience.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs. 25,000/- for Chief Academic and Administrative Officer and Research Associate. Honorary for Professor of Practice.

selection_process: Scrutiny (Shortlisting) based on merit and profile Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Gujarat University Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 22-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download Gujarat University Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Gujarat University Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit applications for the Gujarat University Recruitment 2026 is 22nd June 2026. Ensure your application is sent via email before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in Gujarat University Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Gujarat University has announced a total of 3 vacancies for the Vedantic Science and Life Management program. These include positions for Chief Academic and Administrative Officer, Research Associate, and Professor of Practice.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for Gujarat University Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is via email. Candidates need to send their complete application along with required documents to the specified email address.

faq.question: Q4. What are the eligibility criteria for the Research Associate post?
faq.answer: To be eligible for the Research Associate position, candidates must possess a NET/GSET/Ph.D. in Sanskrit. This is a key requirement for this role.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Chief Academic and Administrative Officer post?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Chief Academic and Administrative Officer post is Rs. 25,000/- per month. This is a contractual position.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for Gujarat University Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for any category of candidates applying for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for these posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves two main stages: scrutiny (shortlisting) based on merit and profile, followed by an interview for the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q8. What is the qualification required for the Professor of Practice (POP) role?
faq.answer: For the Professor of Practice role, candidates need to be experts with at least 15 years of experience in fields like Natural Farming, Ayurveda, NGO Management, or Education.

faq.question: Q9. Can candidates apply through any other mode apart from email?
faq.answer: The primary application mode mentioned is email. Additionally, applications can also be sent via post or courier to the provided address for the Course Coordinator.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for Gujarat University Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the "Important Links" section of this article. It is recommended to download and read it thoroughly.
